title: Working with connected accounts
excerpt: Request the treasury capability and collect onboarding requirements for your connected accounts. > The Accounts v2 API doesn’t support Treasury workflows. If you have accounts created with Accounts v2, you can use Accounts v1 to manage the `treasury` and `card_issuing` capabilities. For details, see [Use Accounts as customers](https://docs.stripe.com/accounts-v2/use-accounts-as-customers.md). To use Stripe Treasury for platforms, your platform must have a Stripe *Connect* (Connect is Stripe's solution for multi-party businesses, such as marketplace or software platforms, to route payments between sellers, customers, and other recipients) integration. Stripe Connect enables a platform to provide connected accounts to sellers and service providers.…
